name: Deterra Royalties Limited
analysis: DRR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.5800, stop A$4.2223, target A$5.6530 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
